# llms-full.txt — Votepit Complete Site Content

## Votepit — Open-Source Voting Platform

Votepit is a lightweight, self-hosted up/down voting board for PHP 8.2+ and MySQL.
Designed for shared hosting environments, it requires zero external dependencies
beyond PHP, MySQL, and mod_rewrite.

### Key Features

- **Up/Down Voting**: Classic Reddit-style voting on proposals, features, or ideas
- **Multi-Board**: Separate boards for independent topics or teams
- **Passwordless Authentication**: Magic link login — no passwords to manage
- **MIT Licensed**: Free to use, modify, and redistribute
- **Agent-Ready Architecture**: PSR-4 autoloading, clean separation of concerns
- **Shared Hosting First**: Works out of the box on any PHP/MySQL hosting

### Installation

```bash
composer create-project silvio-l/votepit
```

Or upload files and point your browser to the domain.

### Documentation

Full developer and user documentation at /docs and /de/docs.

### Privacy

Votepit uses cookieless analytics (self-hosted Matomo, IP-anonymized) with
no consent banner required under GDPR/TDDDG. See /privacy for details.

### Tech Stack

- PHP 8.2+ with MySQL
- PSR-4 autoloading via Composer
- Self-hosted Matomo analytics (cookieless, DSGVO-compliant)

### Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/silvio-l/votepit
- Website: https://votepit.com
- License: MIT
